summary_en: Tender offer disclosed for 豊田織. Take-private transaction removes the float and resets capital policy.
summary_jp: 豊田織に対する公開買付を開示。非公開化により資本政策が再構築。

summary_en: 豊田織 cancelled treasury stock. Permanent share-count reduction lifts per-share economics.
summary_jp: 豊田織が自己株式消却を実施。発行済株式数が恒久的に減少。
